mapper.select: SELECT d.disposal_Id,d.foodMaterial_Id, f.foodMaterialName, f.foodMaterialType,fc.foodCategory, d.disposalCountAll, d.disposalPrice, d.disposalDate, r.reason_Id, r.reason FROM DISPOSALS d JOIN FOODM f ON d.foodMaterial_Id = f.foodMaterial_Id JOIN FOODC fc ON f.foodCategory_Id = fc.foodCategory_Id JOIN REASON r ON d.reason_Id = r.reason_Id ORDER BY d.disposal_Id DESC
SELECT f.foodMaterialName FROM DISPOSALS d JOIN FOODM f ON d.foodMaterial_Id = f.foodMaterial_Id
SELECT fc.foodCategory FROM DISPOSALS d JOIN FOODM f ON d.foodMaterial_Id = f.foodMaterial_Id JOIN FOODC fc ON f.foodCategory_Id = fc.foodCategory_Id

SELECT d.disposal_Id AS disposalId, f.foodMaterialName, fc.foodCategory, f.foodMaterialType, d.disposalCountAll, d.disposalPrice, d.disposalDate, r.reason FROM DISPOSALS d JOIN FOODM f ON d.foodMaterial_Id = f.foodMaterial_Id JOIN FOODC fc ON f.foodCategory_Id = fc.foodCategory_Id JOIN REASON r ON d.reason_Id = r.reason_Id WHERE f.bId = #{bId} ORDER BY d.disposal_Id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DISPOSALS d JOIN FOODM f ON d.foodMaterial_Id = f.foodMaterial_Id JOIN FOODC fc ON f.foodCategory_Id = fc.foodCategory_Id JOIN REASON r ON d.reason_Id = r.reason_Id WHERE f.bId = #{bId}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DISPOSALS d JOIN FOODM f ON d.foodMaterial_Id = f.foodMaterial_Id JOIN FOODC fc ON f.foodCategory_Id = fc.foodCategory_Id JOIN REASON r ON d.reason_Id = r.reason_Id WHERE f.bId = #{bId}

SELECT d.disposal_Id, f.foodMaterialName, fc.foodCategory, f.foodMaterialType, d.disposalCountAll, d.disposalPrice, d.disposalDate, r.reason FROM DISPOSALS d JOIN FOODM f ON d.foodMaterial_Id = f.foodMaterial_Id JOIN FOODC fc ON f.foodCategory_Id = fc.foodCategory_Id JOIN REASON r ON d.reason_Id = r.reason_Id WHERE fc.foodCategory = #{category} AND f.bId = #{bId}

SELECT d.*, f.foodMaterialName, fc.foodCategory, r.reason FROM DISPOSALS d JOIN FOODM f ON d.foodMaterial_Id = f.foodMaterial_Id JOIN FOODC fc ON f.foodCategory_Id = fc.foodCategory_Id JOIN REASON r ON d.reason_Id = r.reason_Id WHERE f.bId = #{bId} ORDER BY d.disposal_Id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT d.disposal_Id FROM DISPOSALS d JOIN FOODM f ON d.foodMaterial_Id = f.foodMaterial_Id WHERE f.bId = #{bId} AND f.expirationDate < CURDATE()

SELECT f.foodMaterial_Id, f.foodMaterialName, SUM(d.disposalPrice) AS totalDisposalPrice, SUM(d.disposalCountAll) AS disposalCount FROM DISPOSALS d JOIN FOODM f ON d.foodMaterial_Id = f.foodMaterial_Id WHERE f.bId = #{bId} AND d.disposalDate BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY f.foodMaterial_Id, f.foodMaterialName ORDER BY totalDisposalPrice DESC LIMIT 3

SELECT r.reason_Id, r.reason, COUNT(*) AS disposalCount, (COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER()) AS reasonRatio FROM DISPOSALS d JOIN REASON r ON d.reason_Id = r.reason_Id JOIN FOODM f ON d.foodMaterial_Id = f.foodMaterial_Id WHERE f.bId = #{bId} AND d.disposalDate BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY r.reason_Id, r.reason

SELECT d.disposalDate AS disposalDay, SUM(d.disposalCountAll) AS disposalCount, SUM(d.disposalPrice) AS totalDisposalPrice FROM DISPOSALS d JOIN FOODM f ON d.foodMaterial_Id = f.foodMaterial_Id WHERE f.bId = #{bId} AND d.disposalDate BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY d.disposalDate ORDER BY d.disposalDate

SELECT d.disposalDate AS disposalDay, f.foodMaterialType, SUM(d.disposalCountAll) AS disposalCount, SUM(d.disposalPrice) AS totalDisposalPrice FROM DISPOSALS d JOIN FOODM f ON d.foodMaterial_Id = f.foodMaterial_Id WHERE f.bId = #{bId} AND d.disposalDate BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY d.disposalDate, f.foodMaterialType ORDER BY d.disposalDate
